overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The character traverses a pedestrian plaza beneath elevated walkways, crosses a wide intersection with heavy neon advertising, and stops to observe futuristic traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza beneath elevated transit walkway

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in an orange jacket through the covered plaza toward the street

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the street intersection wearing an orange jacket

entered.detail: futuristic elevated transit structure with green and orange trim spanning overhead
tall vertical digital screen displaying a pink neon advertisement with a face
large rectangular concrete planter containing a mature tree
wide concrete staircase leading up to the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian plaza beneath a green and orange elevated walkway. Digital billboards glow in the distance as the character follows an NPC in an orange jacket toward the street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered plaza into open intersection with visible sky and towering billboards
ambient light increases as camera moves from under the elevated structure into the open dusk sky

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk while continuing to follow the NPC ahead

notable_agents.action: continuing to walk across the intersection ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive building covered in multiple digital screens and neon advertisements
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
short concrete posts lining the edge of the pedestrian area
tall modern street light with glowing fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the elevated walkway into a wide intersection dominated by towering digital billboards. The character steps onto a yellow crosswalk and continues following the NPC as the dusk sky becomes visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: central intersection with heavy neon advertising and vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic silver vehicle passes through the intersection while crossing
slows down and stops at the far sidewalk after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: traversing the wide intersection while observing surrounding traffic and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection
dark-colored futuristic vehicle passing through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: white grid-patterned road marking indicating pedestrian crossing zone
sleek silver futuristic car with glowing accents
tall palm trees lining the far side of the street
traffic signal pole with multiple lights and sensors

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the expansive intersection as futuristic vehicles drive past. The sky shows vibrant dusk colors contrasting with the neon advertisements. The camera slows to a stop at the far sidewalk after completing the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with traffic control and waiting pedestrians

events.description: character with pink hair passes close to the camera view then moves to the left
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the street in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing traffic and waiting for vehicles to pass

notable_agents.action: character with pink hair standing at the corner waiting to cross the street
futuristic black sedan driving past the intersection

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian sidewalk at the corner of the intersection
pedestrian with distinctive pink hair wearing a red jacket

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the street corner where a character with pink hair waits nearby. Futuristic vehicles continue to pass through the intersection as the dusk sky darkens, with towering digital billboards illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian plaza into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic city intersection at dusk. It begins beneath a green and orange elevated walkway, following a character in an orange jacket toward the distant glow of digital billboards. As the camera emerges from the cover of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the character steps onto a yellow crosswalk under a vibrant dusk sky. The movement continues across the expansive street amidst a flow of futuristic vehicles before slowing to a stop on the far sidewalk. Finally, the camera settles at a street corner near a character with pink hair, as the darkening sky deepens the contrast with the towering, luminous advertisements.
